stemHtml: The maximum running load of the aft cargo hold of an aeroplane is 1650 kg/m. Assume the standard mass of the proposed pallet is 120 kg and 2299 kg of baggage have to be loaded in the aft cargo hold. Which of the following pallets (length x width) should be used in order to comply with the running load limit and to optimise best the space in the cargo hold?
